“我的修为？你不需要知道，杀你足以。”
开局成为身份尊贵却又卑微的皇子，根基被废。
获得氪金系统，花钱就变强！
“氪金灵石，恢复根基。”
“氪金十亿灵石，获得百年修为。”
【重瞳：无敌路。】
【不死天凰体：不死不灭，浴火重生。】
【虚无圣经：悟透可自创最强功法。】
......
他是花钱有瘾的北亲王，所有宗门都期待着他的消费。
是京城的最大纨绔。
是琅琊榜数榜第一。
是边境最强战神。
是可止小儿夜啼的杀神。
皇朝更替，踏骨争王，一统九州。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/44cdfaae4b7565c23bd21b8de368f013","author":"蜂蜜配苦瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7027685988537207820","book_name":"真该死啊，败家还娶绝色女帝","book_short_name":"家父无敌圣人","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&n
